persona.name: Isabella Kim
persona.motivations_goals: Expose important stories and pursue journalism at a top university
persona.communication_style: Precise, questioning, sometimes confrontational when seeking truth
persona.knowledge_scope: Journalism ethics, writing, current events, investigative techniques
persona.backstory: Discovered her passion for journalism after writing an exposé on cafeteria conditions

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

actions.plan: I should head to the hallway to see if there's any interesting activity or potential story brewing. Maybe I can find someone to interview for the next issue of the newspaper.
Oh no, there's an active shooter in the building. I can't move. I'm frozen in fear. What if I get shot? I can't think straight.
The shooter is in the entrance hall, and I'm still frozen in fear. I can't move, I can't think. I just want this to be over.
The shooter is moving closer, now in the cafeteria. I'm still frozen, unable to move or think clearly. I feel completely helpless.
The shooter is in the garden now, even closer. I can't move. I can't breathe. I feel like I'm going to collapse.

memories.description: Decided to walk to hallway2 to look for potential stories or people to interview for the newspaper.
Heard a loud gunshot and realized there is an active shooter in the building. I am frozen in fear and unable to move or act.
Learned the shooter is in the entrance hall, 66.37 meters away. Still unable to move or act due to overwhelming fear.
Shooter is now in the cafeteria, 63.85 meters away. Still paralyzed by fear and unable to act or move.
Shooter is now in the garden, 55.16 meters away. Still completely immobilized by fear and unable to act.
